applicabilityConditions: Azure AI infrastructure requires material sequential investment
Customer demand and pipeline require faster capacity additions than owned buildout can deliver
priorityOrder: Supplement with third-party capacity when lead time requires
recommendedAction: Concentrate capital on AI infrastructure while reallocating talent from non-strategic areas and using external supply for immediate demand gaps
nonApplicabilityConditions: Broad cloud demand without a specific platform shift
Investment needs not spanning infrastructure and multiple operating teams
exceptions: Every team remains subject to disciplined cost management
External supply supplements owned capacity only when lead time requires
reversalSignals: Customer demand no longer guides investment
Cost-revenue alignment no longer the governing constraint
